case_title: *** Transferred to Riversdie *** BANK OF AMERICA N.A VS. MICHAEL STERN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2018 CONTINUED TO APR-10-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE FEB-06-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-10-2018 CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-10-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO RIVERSIDE COUNTY (PALM SPRINGS) AND PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY ALL REQUIRED TRANSFER FEES. THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, TEL. 415.551.5868, EMAILS:TORREANOM@AOL.COM/MTOREANO@SFTC.ORG. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of And Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Aug-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Bank of America's motion to transfer venue is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The case is transferred to Riverside County (Palm Springs) and plaintiff shall pay all required transfer fees. The moving party is to prepare a form order. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, Tel. 415.551.5868, Emails:torreanom@aol.com/mtoreano@sftc.org. =(302/RBU)
